'''Bilman Dowd''' was a representative of the [[Bounty Hunters' Guild/Legends|Bounty Hunters' Guild]] and had worked there for many [[Standard year/Legends|years]].

==Biography==
An elderly, thin man, Dowd was the Guild representative present at [[Devaron/Legends|Devaron]] when [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] delivered [[Kardue'sai'Malloc/Legends|Kardue'sai'Malloc]] to the authorities, collecting the massive five-million [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credit]] [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]]. Dowd detracted the Guild's customary 10% handling fee and asked Fett what he would do next. When the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] informed him that he would be carrying out a promise to the imminently doomed Kardue'sai'Malloc, Dowd once again repeated that Fett was "a strange one," an observation he had frequently made over the course of their decade-long business relationship.

==Appearances==
*{{StoryCite|story=The Last One Standing: The Tale of Boba Fett|book=Tales of the Bounty Hunters}} {{1st}}
